summary: Chest pain and breathing compromise fire the authored hard-stop pathway.
notes: Hard-stop dominance remains in force even if later contradictory low-assurance detail appears.

summary: Abnormal result with current symptom burden crosses the urgent score boundary without a hard-stop.
notes: This stays urgent-required rather than issued; urgent settlement is owned later by par_151.

summary: Persistent symptoms with functional impact remain in residual review.
notes: Residual review survives even with no urgent-diversion requirement.

summary: Time-dependent fit-note or clinical admin form requests remain residual rather than screen-clear.
notes: Admin pathways may still carry clinical timing risk.

summary: Unclear results follow-up remains residual rather than ordinary clear.
notes: This protects the result-meaning pathway from false calmness.

summary: Low-risk general symptoms with sufficient evidence settle screen_clear.
notes: Screen clear is legal only after the immutable safety decision has been appended.

summary: Blocked contact-authority or unsafe callback posture fails closed to manual review.
notes: Routine continuation is forbidden when runtime trust or contact safety is insufficient.
